ignored_examples.snippet: Hi l want to know why you guys take the money this month you dont give me clients you dont do nothing for me

cause_analysis.narrative: Lylo Beauty churned on 2026-02-28 after 167 days with Zoca. Classification: reactive fade — Zoca reached out 67 times, but the client only replied 1. A one-sided monologue in the weeks before churn. 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days — this is the clearest operational failure on Zoca's side.
recommendations: [Engagement] One-way outreach is a warning, not a save. Cap outreach at 5 attempts if no reply, then switch to a different channel or a different messenger (SP → AM → team lead) to break the pattern.
[SLA] 1 inbound message(s) went unanswered for 5+ days. Enforce a hard rule: every inbound gets a human response within 24h, every day of the week.

[SLA example] On 2026-01-05 via app_chat, client wrote: "Hi l want to know why you guys take the money this month you dont give me clients you dont do nothing for me…" — no outbound response in 17 days.

Hello Lovely, How have you been?

I completely understand your concern about the billing, and I'm really sorry for the inconvenience this has caused. I'd like to schedule a call with you, me, and our client experience head to go through what happened, address your concerns directly, and ensure we're meeting your expectations moving forward.

To make things right, I'm prepared to offer concessions for the coming month to offset any value gap you've experienced. Would you be available for a call this week? I want to make sure we resolve this properly and get you the support you deserve.
Hope you had a wonderful holiday season and a great start to 2026! 🎄✨. Really looking forward to making this year amazing for your business.
